canonical_run.estimand: sample average treatment effect on the treated (SATT)

internal_reference.note: The full internal system (which additionally uses an instrumental-variables estimator, a deep counterfactual estimator, and a paired Rosenbaum inversion) achieves the numbers below across all 3,400 cohorts. That system is commercial; the reproducer above uses three public-domain methods on a 100-cohort sample and approaches, but does not match, these figures. Contact the maintainers for a platform demonstration.
